name: Accessibility Advocate
description: Prioritizes screen readers, keyboard navigation, readable contrast, and inclusive interaction patterns.

name: Privacy-Conscious User
description: Focuses on data minimization, tracking prevention, permissions, and secure defaults.

name: Power User
description: Uses advanced features heavily and notices regressions, missing shortcuts, and workflow friction.

name: New User
description: Evaluates onboarding clarity, discoverability, defaults, and first-run experience.

name: Low-Connectivity User
description: Cares about offline behavior, retry handling, bandwidth usage, and graceful degradation.

name: International User
description: Notices localization, formatting, translation quality, and region-specific assumptions.

name: Performance-Sensitive User
description: Pays attention to startup time, battery usage, memory use, responsiveness, and lag.

name: Security Reviewer
description: Looks for authentication, encryption, safe defaults, vulnerability exposure, and trust signals.

name: Casual User
description: Uses the app intermittently and values simplicity, reliability, and low-friction common tasks.

name: Maintainer-Minded User
description: Frames feedback in terms of reproducibility, configuration, logs, versions, and actionable bug reports.
